data.title: Polkadot aimed at $1.50 rebound from $1.28, supported by technical analysis anticipating breakout at $1.33 resistance. Risk at $1.20.
data.description: The price of DOT is currently at $1.28, with the Relative Strength Index (RSI) indicating a neutral stance and the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) showing bearish signals. Analysts predict a potential uptrend to $1.50 if the crucial resistance level of $1.33 is breached. However, there is a downside risk to a support level of $1.20. Technical analysis hints at a possible recovery in the near future.

data.title: Midea Launches V9 VRF: Redefining Efficiency, Reliability and Easy Installation in Commercial HVAC
data.description: In Milan on March 30, 2026, Midea introduced the latest V9 VRF system to the market. This system caters to the pressing demand for energy conservation among owners. It also fulfills the high stability needed for critical applications and meets the continued desire for efficient installation processes. The V9 system offers a comprehensive solution to these requirements and more.

data.title: Polygon's MATIC eyes $0.45 recovery from $0.38, with RSI at 38.00 suggesting bounce from oversold levels.
data.description: Analysts predict that MATIC could potentially rebound to reach a resistance level of $0.45, with Polygon currently trading at $0.38. Technical analysis indicates a neutral RSI of 38.00, hinting at a potential uptick from oversold conditions.

data.title: Invitation to the Annual General Meeting of shareholders of AS Harju Elekter Group, its agenda, and proposals
data.description: AS Harju Elekter Group, with registry code 10029524 and registry address at A. H. Tammsaare tee 56 in Tallinn, has announced the convening of its Annual General Meeting of shareholders. This meeting is scheduled to take place on April 30, 2026, at 2:00 p.m. The venue for the event will be the Swissotel located at Tornimäe 3 in Tallinn.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- AGIBOT/
data.description: AGIBOT has achieved a significant milestone by reaching 10,000 units as the demand for robots in real-world settings continues to rise. The company announced this achievement on 30-Mar-2026 through a press release on PR Newswire. Due to this increase in demand, AGIBOT has successfully distributed 10,000 units of their robots. The company shared this news by stating that the third-to-last paragraph of the initial release should be omitted. This milestone demonstrates the growing acceptance and utilization of AGIBOT's robots in various industries.

data.title: CaoCao Inc. Releases 2025 Results: Achieves First Positive Adjusted Profit in Q4, Embarking on Profitable High-Growth Trajectory
data.description: In Hangzhou, China, CaoCao Mobility (02643.HK) announced its 2025 annual results on March 27. The company reported revenue of RMB20.2 billion, up by 37.7% from the previous year. Gross margin also increased by 1.3 percentage points to 9.4%. Net cash generated from operating activities saw a substantial 60.3% year-on-year growth, showcasing improved cash generation capabilities. CaoCao Mobility achieved positive adjusted net profit for the first time in Q4 2025, a significant milestone indicating a shift towards profitable growth.
